title: Idling Stop System Failure Diagnostic Table by Symptom

blocks.text: Idling Stop System Failure Diagnostic Table by Symptom

rows: Check valve (built into the vacuum hose)
Vacuum tubing (between master power vacuum hose and master power negative pressure sensor)

Rod seal or secondary cup on master cylinder *NOTE: Hermetic condition (magnitude of leakage) of the above components and idle stop events. A large leakage will result in a non-stop idle event. Small leaks result in events with short idle stop times.
